ActivationEvidence.description: Convergence: несколько техник указывают на одну планету/дом/сферу
ActivationEvidence.title: ActivationEvidence

AuthError.description: Stable error envelope for 400 and 401 bodies on /api/auth/*.
AuthError.title: AuthError

AuthSession.description:
POST /api/auth/telegram — 200 response body.

The opaque session token itself is NEVER in the body; it travels in the
HttpOnly Set-Cookie header.
AuthSession.title: AuthSession

BirthData.description:
Birth-place + birth-time data. Every field is optional (incremental
onboarding). Validators enforce per-field ranges and lat/lon co-presence.
BirthData.title: BirthData

PeriodContext.description: Почему это важно именно сейчас (фон периода)
PeriodContext.title: PeriodContext

ProfileRead.description: Response shape for GET /api/profile. Privacy: NO tg_user_id, NO tokens.
ProfileRead.title: ProfileRead

ProfileWrite.description:
Request body for PUT /api/profile.

Field-level partial: omitted top-level fields are 'unchanged'. The
`birth` block is itself a BirthData (also optional fields), so callers
can update e.g. only `birthCity` by sending `{"birth": {"birthCity": "..."}}`.
ProfileWrite.title: ProfileWrite
